title: Delicate Spanish Ume Plum Tapas Platter
description: A resinous and snappy Spanish dish featuring ume-plum with an al-dente finish, perfect for a nostalgic tapas experience. This macrobiotic-friendly platter is a delightful combination of flavors and textures.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, pimenton, and sea salt.
Arrange the pickled ume plums on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil mixture over the ume plums and toss to coat.
Roast the ume plums in the preheated oven for 10 minutes, or until they are slightly caramelized.
While the ume plums are roasting, toast the sliced almonds in a small skillet over medium heat.
In a large serving platter, arrange the roasted ume plums, toasted almonds, chopped parsley, and crumbled manchego cheese.
Drizzle any remaining olive oil mixture over the top of the platter and serve immediately.
